# FlyFast

> Natural language flight search with conflict zone filtering.

FlyFast is a free, open source flight search engine at flyfast.app. Users describe their trip in plain English (e.g. "Mumbai to Hamburg next week under $300") and FlyFast searches every available flight, filters routes through active conflict zones, and ranks results by price, duration, stops, and route safety. Users book directly with the airline.

## Key features

- Natural language search: type a sentence instead of filling forms
- Conflict zone filtering: routes through high-risk airspace are removed or flagged
- Safety badges: each flight is labeled Safe, Caution, High Risk, or Do Not Fly
- Every available flight
- Multi-city, flexible date, and budget-aware search
- No login, no ads, no account required
- Open source (github.com/buildingopen/opensky)

## How it works

1. User types a natural language query
2. AI (Gemini) parses the query into structured search parameters (origins, destinations, dates, budget, cabin)
3. FlyFast searches flight providers for all origin-destination-date combinations
4. Each route is checked against a conflict zone dataset
5. Results are scored by safety, price, duration, and stops
6. User clicks through to book directly with the airline

## Conflict zone filtering

FlyFast maintains a dataset of active conflict zones, restricted airspace, and aviation advisory regions. Every flight route's airports and airways are checked against this data. High-risk routes are excluded from results. Caution-level routes are shown with a warning. The dataset is updated regularly; the last update date is shown in the footer.

## Pricing

Free. No premium tier. Rate limited to 10 searches per hour per user.

## Built by

Building Open (buildingopen.org)

## Contact

hello@buildingopen.org

## Conflict zone safety pages

FlyFast publishes live conflict zone status pages at /safety/{zone-id}. Each page shows the current risk level, source citations, affected airports, and traveler guidance. Updated daily.

- Index: https://flyfast.app/safety
- https://flyfast.app/safety/ukraine
- https://flyfast.app/safety/iran
- https://flyfast.app/safety/iraq
- https://flyfast.app/safety/syria
- https://flyfast.app/safety/israel
- https://flyfast.app/safety/lebanon
- https://flyfast.app/safety/yemen
- https://flyfast.app/safety/libya
- https://flyfast.app/safety/somalia
- https://flyfast.app/safety/afghanistan
- https://flyfast.app/safety/north_korea
- https://flyfast.app/safety/sudan
- https://flyfast.app/safety/eritrea
- https://flyfast.app/safety/ethiopia_partial
- https://flyfast.app/safety/mali
- https://flyfast.app/safety/niger
- https://flyfast.app/safety/gulf_states
- https://flyfast.app/safety/pakistan_partial
- https://flyfast.app/safety/russia_partial
